name: Autobots
changelog: The full Autobots Desktop app. Enter your key locally and run the bot 24/7 with self-signing. Sui-native data spine (DeepBook on-chain fill-tape candles + order-book imbalance filter), pro toolkit (Optimizer, Robustness Lab, anchored walk-forward), and hard safety interlocks (kill-switch, max-daily-loss, liquidation guard). A standalone local agent (autobots-agent-v1.1.0.zip) is also attached to the release.
